title: eragrostis remotiflora
intro: Eragrostis remotiflora, a species of grass native to Australia, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis remotiflora include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis remotiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
